objects.name: Position
objects.description: A funded headcount slot in Workday with budget and salary band, against which Requisitions are opened.
objects.descriptionZh: Workday 中带预算与薪资范围的已拨款编制名额，需求基于该职位发起。

sources.snippet: System of record for Position, headcount, and Approval chain.

objects.name: SalaryBand
objects.description: The published salary band (min/mid/max) for a job level and location zone, mastered in Workday.
objects.descriptionZh: 按职级与地区发布的薪资范围（最低/中位/最高），主数据在 Workday。

objects.name: Requisition
objects.description: A hiring request opened against a Position in Greenhouse, moving Draft -> Approved -> Open -> Filled/Closed.
objects.descriptionZh: 在 Greenhouse 中基于职位开立的招聘请求，状态从草稿到审批通过、开放，再到填补/关闭。

attributes.name: closed_at
attributes.description: Nullable; set when the requisition is filled or closed.

sources.snippet: produces a `Requisition` record in `Draft` status in Greenhouse, linked to the Workday `Position`.

objects.name: Candidate
objects.description: A person being considered for one or more Requisitions, deduplicated globally by email in Greenhouse.
objects.descriptionZh: 被一项或多项招聘需求考虑的人选，在 Greenhouse 中按邮箱全局去重。

attributes.name: is_internal
attributes.description: True when the candidate is a current employee (per R18).

attributes.name: consent_retention_until
attributes.description: Nullable; talent-pool retention consent date (per R16).

objects.name: Application
objects.description: The unique link between one Candidate and one Requisition, advancing through staged review to Hired or Rejected.
objects.descriptionZh: 一名候选人与一项招聘需求之间的唯一关联，经分阶段评审推进至录用或拒绝。

sources.snippet: An `Application` is the unique link between one `Candidate` and one `Requisition`.

objects.name: InterviewStage
objects.description: A structured interview stage of an Application, bound to an InterviewPanel of at least three Interviewers including a Bar Raiser.
objects.descriptionZh: 申请的一个结构化面试阶段，绑定至少由三名面试官（含一名 Bar Raiser）组成的面试小组。

attributes.name: panel_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the InterviewPanel for this stage.

objects.name: Scorecard
objects.description: One Interviewer's structured recommendation for an Application at a given InterviewStage.
objects.descriptionZh: 某面试官在指定面试阶段对一份申请给出的结构化推荐意见。

sources.snippet: produces one `Scorecard` per `Interviewer` with a recommendation (Strong Yes / Yes / No / Strong No).

objects.name: Assessment
objects.description: A HackerRank technical assessment for an Application, scored as a percentage against a 70% pass threshold.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对某份申请的 HackerRank 技术测评，按百分比评分，及格线为 70%。

objects.name: Offer
objects.description: A compensation offer for an Application, priced against a SalaryBand and signed via DocuSign through its lifecycle.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对某份申请的薪酬录用通知，依据薪资范围定价，并经 DocuSign 在其生命周期内签署。

attributes.name: expires_at
attributes.description: Expiry date, <= 7 business days after extension (per R9).

sources.snippet: produces an `Offer` record in `Draft` with base salary, bonus target, equity, and start date.

objects.name: Approval
objects.description: A polymorphic approval record against a Requisition or an Offer, capturing approver, level, and decision.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对招聘需求或录用通知的多态审批记录，记录审批人、级别与决定。

attributes.name: subject_id
attributes.description: Polymorphic reference to a Requisition or Offer, discriminated by subject_type (per §5). Not a single-target FK, so no refObjectTypeId.

sources.snippet: An `Approval` polymorphically references either a `Requisition` or an `Offer` via (`subject_type`, `subject_id`).

objects.name: BackgroundCheck
objects.description: A Checkr background screening for a Candidate tied to an accepted Offer, gating conversion to Worker.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对与已接受录用关联的候选人的 Checkr 背景调查，作为转为正式员工的前置门槛。

objects.name: Worker
objects.description: A Workday Worker record — the hired employee, and the identity backing HiringManagers and Interviewers.
objects.descriptionZh: Workday 中的员工记录——已入职员工，同时也是招聘经理与面试官的身份载体。

attributes.name: is_bar_raiser_certified
attributes.description: True for trained Bar Raisers (per R14).

sources.snippet: produces a `Worker` record in Workday, closes the `Requisition` as `Filled`, and decrements the `Position` headcount.

relationships.name: opened_against
relationships.description: Each Requisition is opened against exactly one funded Position.

sources.snippet: produces a `Requisition` record in `Draft` status in Greenhouse, linked to the Workday `Position`.

relationships.name: priced_by
relationships.description: Each Position is associated with one SalaryBand.

relationships.name: submits
relationships.description: One Candidate may submit many Applications.

relationships.name: applies_to
relationships.description: Many Applications target one Requisition; each Application links exactly one Candidate to one Requisition.

relationships.name: has_stage
relationships.description: An Application proceeds through one or more InterviewStages.

relationships.name: has_scorecard
relationships.description: Each InterviewStage collects one Scorecard per Interviewer.

sources.snippet: produces one `Scorecard` per `Interviewer` with a recommendation

relationships.name: has_assessment
relationships.description: An Application may have a technical Assessment when required by the role.

relationships.name: results_in
relationships.description: An advancing Application results in at most one active Offer.

sources.snippet: An `Offer` links back to exactly one `Application`, `Requisition`, and `SalaryBand`.

relationships.name: fills

label.zh: 录用通知 → 招聘需求

relationships.description: An Offer is made against one Requisition.

relationships.name: priced_against

label.zh: 录用通知 → 薪资范围

relationships.description: An Offer's base salary is validated against the role's SalaryBand.

sources.snippet: consumes the `Offer`'s proposed salary and the published `SalaryBand` for the role and location

relationships.name: undergoes
relationships.description: An accepted Candidate undergoes a BackgroundCheck before conversion.

rules.title: Offer requires approved requisition
rules.titleZh: 录用须需求已审批通过

statement.en: An Offer may not be extended unless its linked Requisition is in status Approved.
statement.zh: 除非关联的招聘需求处于已审批通过状态，否则不得发出录用通知。

trigger.description: Before an Offer transitions to Extended.

sources.snippet: An `Offer` may not be extended unless its linked `Requisition` is in status `Approved`.

rules.title: Above-band offer needs VP approval

statement.en: An Offer whose proposed base salary falls above the role's published SalaryBand maximum is required to obtain VP approval recorded against the Requisition before it may be extended.
statement.zh: 若录用通知的拟定基本薪资高于该职位发布的薪资范围上限，须先获得针对该招聘需求记录的VP审批，方可发出。

rules.formal: Offer.base_salary > SalaryBand.max_salary → ∃ Approval(level=VP, subject=Requisition) before Offer.status=Extended

sources.snippet: An `Offer` whose proposed base salary falls above the role's published `SalaryBand` maximum is required to obtain VP approval recorded against the `Requisition` before it may be extended.

rules.title: In-band offer needs HM and HRBP approval

statement.en: An in-band Offer shall be approved by both the Hiring Manager and the HR Business Partner before extension.
statement.zh: 范围内的录用通知须在发出前同时获得招聘经理与HR业务伙伴的批准。

trigger.description: On routing an in-band Offer for approval.

sources.snippet: An in-band `Offer` shall be approved by both the Hiring Manager and the HR Business Partner before extension.

statement.en: A Requisition whose proposed annualized cost exceeds the funded Position budget by more than 10% must be escalated to VP approval before it may be published.
statement.zh: 若招聘需求的拟定年化成本超过已拨款职位预算的10%以上，须先升级至VP审批，方可发布。

sources.snippet: A `Requisition` whose proposed annualized cost exceeds the funded `Position` budget by more than 10% must be escalated to VP approval before it may be published.

rules.title: Below-band salary needs comp exception
rules.titleZh: 低于范围薪资须薪酬例外

statement.en: A proposed base salary that is below the role's SalaryBand minimum may not be entered on an Offer without a documented Compensation Analyst exception.
statement.zh: 低于该职位薪资范围下限的拟定基本薪资，未经记录的薪酬分析师例外审批，不得录入录用通知。

trigger.description: When entering base salary on a Draft Offer.

sources.snippet: A proposed base salary that is below the role's `SalaryBand` minimum may not be entered on an `Offer` without a documented Compensation Analyst exception.

rules.title: Sign-on bonus capped at 20% without VP

statement.en: A sign-on bonus on an Offer may not exceed 20% of the proposed annual base salary without VP approval.
statement.zh: 未经VP审批，录用通知的签约奖金不得超过拟定年度基本薪资的20%。

sources.snippet: A sign-on bonus on an `Offer` may not exceed 20% of the proposed annual base salary without VP approval.

statement.en: Every Application must clear a structured InterviewPanel of at least three Interviewers before it may reach the Offer stage.
statement.zh: 每份申请须通过由至少三名面试官组成的结构化面试小组，方可进入录用阶段。

trigger.description: Before an Application reaches the Offer stage.

sources.snippet: Every `Application` must clear a structured `InterviewPanel` of at least three `Interviewer`s before it may reach the `Offer` stage.

rules.title: All scorecards before advance decision
rules.titleZh: 全部评分齐备方可推进

statement.en: A hiring decision of Advance to Offer shall not be recorded until every assigned Interviewer has submitted a Scorecard for the Application.
statement.zh: 在每名指派面试官均已为该申请提交评分表之前，不得记录“推进至录用”的招聘决定。

rules.formal: HiringDecision = AdvanceToOffer → ∀ Interviewer ∈ Panel: ∃ Scorecard(Interviewer, Application)

sources.snippet: A hiring decision of `Advance to Offer` shall not be recorded until every assigned `Interviewer` has submitted a `Scorecard` for the `Application`.

statement.en: For engineering roles, a Candidate whose Assessment score is below 70% may not advance past the Recruiter Screen stage.
statement.zh: 对于工程类岗位，技术测评得分低于70%的候选人不得越过招聘官初筛阶段。

trigger.description: After Assessment completion for engineering roles.

sources.snippet: For engineering roles, a `Candidate` whose `Assessment` score is below 70% may not advance past the `Recruiter Screen` stage.

rules.title: One scorecard per interviewer per application
rules.titleZh: 每名面试官每份申请仅一张评分表

statement.en: No single Interviewer may submit more than one Scorecard for the same Application.
statement.zh: 同一名面试官不得为同一份申请提交多于一张评分表。

sources.snippet: No single `Interviewer` may submit more than one `Scorecard` for the same `Application`.

rules.title: Panel must include independent Bar Raiser

statement.en: At least one member of every InterviewPanel is required to be a trained Bar Raiser independent of the hiring team.
statement.zh: 每个面试小组须至少有一名经培训且独立于招聘团队的Bar Raiser成员。

rules.formal: ∀ InterviewPanel: ∃ member m: m.is_bar_raiser_certified ∧ m ∉ hiringTeam

sources.snippet: At least one member of every `InterviewPanel` is required to be a trained Bar Raiser independent of the hiring team.

rules.title: Interviewer with personal relationship must recuse
rules.titleZh: 有私人关系面试官须回避

statement.en: An Interviewer who has a personal relationship with the Candidate must recuse from the InterviewPanel and may not submit a Scorecard.
statement.zh: 与候选人存在私人关系的面试官须从面试小组中回避，且不得提交评分表。

trigger.description: When assigning Interviewers to a panel.

sources.snippet: An `Interviewer` who has a personal relationship with the `Candidate` must recuse from the `InterviewPanel` and may not submit a `Scorecard`.

rules.title: Offer expiry within 7 business days

statement.en: An Offer is required to specify an expiry date no more than 7 business days after it is extended, and an Offer not accepted by its expiry date shall transition to status Expired.
statement.zh: 录用通知须指定自发出起不超过7个工作日的到期日；到期未被接受的录用通知须转为已过期状态。

rules.formal: Offer.expires_at <= extended_at + 7 business days ∧ (now > Offer.expires_at ∧ Offer.status ≠ Accepted → Offer.status = Expired)

trigger.description: On Offer extension and at expiry.

sources.snippet: An `Offer` is required to specify an expiry date no more than 7 business days after it is extended, and an `Offer` not accepted by its expiry date shall transition to status `Expired`.

rules.title: Clear background check before hire

statement.en: A Candidate may not be converted to a Worker until a BackgroundCheck with result Clear is on file; a result of Consider shall suspend the hire pending individualized adjudication.
statement.zh: 在备有结果为Clear的背景调查之前，候选人不得转为正式员工；结果为Consider时须暂停入职，等待个案裁定。

rules.formal: Candidate → Worker requires BackgroundCheck.result = 'Clear'; BackgroundCheck.result = 'Consider' → suspend hire

trigger.description: Before converting an accepted Candidate to a Worker.

sources.snippet: A `Candidate` may not be converted to a `Worker` until a `BackgroundCheck` with result `Clear` is on file; a result of `Consider` shall suspend the hire pending individualized adjudication.

statement.en: A Requisition must remain open for a minimum posting period of 5 business days before any Offer may be extended against it.
statement.zh: 招聘需求须保持开放至少5个工作日的发布期，方可针对其发出任何录用通知。

trigger.description: Before extending an Offer against a Requisition.

sources.snippet: A `Requisition` must remain open for a minimum posting period of 5 business days before any `Offer` may be extended against it.

rules.title: Candidate data retained max 24 months
rules.titleZh: 候选人数据最多保留24个月

statement.en: A Candidate's personal data must be retained for no longer than 24 months after the final Application disposition unless the Candidate has consented to a longer talent-pool retention.
statement.zh: 除非候选人同意更长的人才库保留期，否则其个人数据在最终申请处置后保留期不得超过24个月。

sources.snippet: A `Candidate`'s personal data must be retained for no longer than 24 months after the final `Application` disposition unless the `Candidate` has consented to a longer talent-pool retention.

statement.en: Every Application that is rejected is required to record a standardized disposition reason code before it may be closed.
statement.zh: 每份被拒绝的申请须先记录标准化的处置原因代码，方可关闭。

sources.snippet: Every `Application` that is rejected is required to record a standardized disposition reason code before it may be closed.

rules.title: Qualified internal candidate gets interview
rules.titleZh: 合格内部候选人保证面试

statement.en: An internal Candidate who is a current employee shall be granted an interview for any Requisition for which they meet the minimum qualifications.
statement.zh: 作为现任员工的内部候选人，对其满足最低任职资格的任何招聘需求，应被给予面试机会。

trigger.description: On screening an internal Candidate's Application.

sources.snippet: An internal `Candidate` who is a current employee shall be granted an interview for any `Requisition` for which they meet the minimum qualifications.

statement.en: A Requisition may not be reopened more than 12 months after it was closed; a new Requisition is required instead.
statement.zh: 招聘需求关闭超过12个月后不得重新开启，须改为新建招聘需求。

trigger.description: On a request to reopen a closed Requisition.

sources.snippet: A `Requisition` may not be reopened more than 12 months after it was closed; a new `Requisition` is required instead.

rules.title: Regulated-role offer needs export-control clearance
rules.titleZh: 受管制岗位录用须出口管制清关

statement.en: An Offer to a Candidate for a regulated role may not be extended until an export-control screening has returned a Cleared result.
statement.zh: 受管制岗位的录用通知，须在出口管制筛查返回“Cleared”结果后，方可向候选人发出。

trigger.description: Before extending an Offer for a regulated role.

sources.snippet: An `Offer` to a `Candidate` for a regulated role may not be extended until an export-control screening has returned a `Cleared` result.

ruleGroups.rationale: Salary-band, budget, and approval-chain controls governing what an Offer or Requisition may contain and who must sign off.
Structured-interview integrity: panel composition, scorecard completeness, assessment thresholds, and conflict-of-interest recusal.
Time windows, background-check gates, data-retention, internal-mobility, and regulatory screening obligations.

actions.name: CreateRequisition
actions.description: Create a draft Requisition in Greenhouse linked to a Workday Position and SalaryBand.
actions.descriptionZh: 在 Greenhouse 中创建草稿招聘需求，并关联至 Workday 职位与薪资范围。

text.en: Capture the hiring manager's role definition and target SalaryBand.
text.zh: 采集招聘经理的角色定义与目标薪资范围。

text.en: Create the Requisition in Draft, linked to the Workday Position.
text.zh: 创建草稿状态的招聘需求，并关联至 Workday 职位。

sideEffects.description: Create a Requisition record in status Draft.

hiring_manager_id.description: Worker id of the hiring manager.

agent.toolDescription: Create a draft Requisition linked to a funded Position.
promptHints: Always link the Requisition to a funded Workday Position before saving.

sources.snippet: `CreateRequisition` — consumes the Hiring Manager's role definition, the target `SalaryBand`, and the `Position` ID from Workday; produces a `Requisition` record in `Draft` status in Greenhouse, linked to the Workday `Position`.

actions.name: ValidateHeadcount
actions.description: Validate Requisition headcount and budget against the funded Position and route an Approval task.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据已拨款职位校验招聘需求的编制与预算，并路由审批任务。

text.en: Read the funded Position headcount and budget from Workday.
text.zh: 从 Workday 读取已拨款职位的编制与预算。

text.en: Set the headcountValidated flag and open an Approval task to the chain; return unfunded Requisitions to the Hiring Manager.
text.zh: 设置编制校验标志并向审批链开立审批任务；将无资金的招聘需求退回招聘经理。

sideEffects.description: Open an Approval task routed to the approval chain.

agent.toolDescription: Validate Requisition headcount/budget and open an Approval task.
promptHints: Return any Requisition with no funded Position to the Hiring Manager.

sources.snippet: `ValidateHeadcount` — consumes the `Requisition` and the approved `Position` headcount and budget in Workday; produces a `headcountValidated` flag and an open `Approval` task routed to the approval chain.

actions.name: ApproveRequisition
actions.description: Record an Approval decision and transition the Requisition to Approved or Rejected.
actions.descriptionZh: 记录审批决定并将招聘需求转为已批准或已拒绝。

text.en: Review the open Approval task and the budget check; escalate to VP if over budget.
text.zh: 审阅开立的审批任务与预算检查；超预算时升级至VP。

text.en: Record the decision, approver, level, and timestamp; transition the Requisition.
text.zh: 记录决定、审批人、级别与时间戳；变更招聘需求状态。

sideEffects.description: Requisition.status := Approved | Rejected.

agent.toolDescription: Approve or reject a Requisition and record the Approval.
promptHints: Above-budget Requisitions require VP approval per R4 before they can be Approved.

sources.snippet: `ApproveRequisition` — consumes the open `Approval` task and the budget check; produces an `Approval` record with decision, approver, level, and timestamp, and transitions the `Requisition` to `Approved` or `Rejected`.

actions.name: PublishJob
actions.description: Publish an approved Requisition as Job Posts and open the application funnel.
actions.descriptionZh: 将已审批通过的招聘需求发布为职位帖并开启申请漏斗。

text.en: Verify the Requisition is Approved and has met the minimum posting period.
text.zh: 确认招聘需求已批准并满足最短发布期。

text.en: Publish one or more public/internal Job Posts and open the funnel.
text.zh: 发布一个或多个对内/对外职位帖并开启漏斗。

sideEffects.description: Requisition.status := Open.
Distribute Job Posts to sourcing channels.

agent.toolDescription: Publish an approved Requisition and open the application funnel.
promptHints: Only publish Requisitions in status Approved.

sources.snippet: `PublishJob` — consumes the `Approved` `Requisition`; produces one or more public/internal `Job Post` records and opens the Application funnel.

actions.name: SourceCandidate
actions.description: Source a passive Candidate against Requisition criteria, deduplicated by email.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据招聘需求条件寻源被动候选人，并按邮箱去重。

text.en: Read search criteria from the Requisition.
text.zh: 从招聘需求读取搜索条件。

text.en: Create or update a Candidate record, deduplicated by email.
text.zh: 创建或更新候选人记录，按邮箱去重。

sideEffects.description: Create or update a Candidate record.

agent.toolDescription: Source and dedupe a passive Candidate.
promptHints: Deduplicate Candidates globally by email before creating a new record.

sources.snippet: `SourceCandidate` — consumes search criteria from the `Requisition`; produces or updates a `Candidate` record (deduplicated by email).

actions.name: CreateApplication
actions.description: Create an Application linking exactly one Candidate to one Requisition in stage Application Review.
actions.descriptionZh: 创建一份申请，将恰好一名候选人与一项招聘需求关联，状态为申请评审。

text.en: Bind the Candidate to the published Requisition.
text.zh: 将候选人绑定至已发布的招聘需求。

text.en: Create the Application in stage Application Review.
text.zh: 创建状态为申请评审的申请。

sideEffects.description: Create an Application in stage Application Review.

agent.toolDescription: Create an Application linking a Candidate to a Requisition.
promptHints: Each Application must link exactly one Candidate to one Requisition.

sources.snippet: `CreateApplication` — consumes the `Candidate` and the published `Requisition`; produces an `Application` record in stage `Application Review`, linking exactly one `Candidate` to one `Requisition`.

actions.name: ScreenApplication
actions.description: Screen an Application against Requisition criteria, advancing or rejecting with a disposition reason.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据招聘需求条件初筛申请，推进或附处置原因拒绝。

text.en: Compare the Application against Requisition criteria.
text.zh: 将申请与招聘需求条件比对。

text.en: Advance to Recruiter Screen or Reject; record a disposition reason on rejection; guarantee an interview for qualified internal candidates.
text.zh: 推进至招聘官初筛或拒绝；拒绝时记录处置原因；为合格内部候选人保证面试。

sideEffects.description: Application.current_stage := Recruiter Screen | Rejected.

agent.toolDescription: Screen an Application and advance or reject it.
promptHints: Record a standardized disposition reason whenever you reject an Application.
Grant an interview to a qualified internal candidate per R18.

sources.snippet: `ScreenApplication` — consumes the `Application` and the `Requisition` criteria; produces an updated `Application` stage of either `Recruiter Screen` (advance) or `Rejected`. Records a screening disposition reason.

actions.name: RequestAssessment
actions.description: Send a HackerRank Assessment invitation and write back the score, gating on the 70% threshold.
actions.descriptionZh: 发送 HackerRank 测评邀请并回写得分，以70%门槛设限。

text.en: Send the Assessment invitation for the Application.
text.zh: 为申请发送测评邀请。

text.en: On completion, write the Assessment score back to the Application and enforce the engineering threshold.
text.zh: 完成后将测评得分回写至申请并执行工程门槛。

sideEffects.description: Invite candidate to a HackerRank assessment.
Write Assessment score back to the Application.

agent.toolDescription: Send a technical Assessment and record the score.
promptHints: For engineering roles, do not advance candidates scoring below 70%.

sources.snippet: `RequestAssessment` — consumes the `Application`; produces an `Assessment` invitation and, on completion, an `Assessment` score written back to the `Application`.

actions.name: ScheduleInterview
actions.description: Schedule a structured InterviewPanel of at least three Interviewers including a Bar Raiser; advance to Onsite.
actions.descriptionZh: 安排由至少三名面试官（含Bar Raiser）组成的结构化面试小组；推进至现场阶段。

text.en: Read the Application and the roster of available Interviewers.
text.zh: 读取申请与可用面试官名单。

text.en: Form one InterviewPanel of >=3 Interviewers with an independent Bar Raiser; recuse conflicted interviewers.
text.zh: 组建一个由不少于3名面试官、含独立Bar Raiser的面试小组；回避有利益冲突的面试官。

text.en: Bind the panel to one InterviewStage and advance the Application to Onsite.
text.zh: 将小组绑定至一个面试阶段并将申请推进至现场。

sideEffects.description: Application.current_stage := Onsite.
Send calendar invites to panel Interviewers.

promptHints: Every panel must have at least three interviewers and one independent Bar Raiser.
Recuse any interviewer with a personal relationship to the candidate.

sources.snippet: `ScheduleInterview` — consumes the `Application` and a roster of available `Interviewer`s; produces one `InterviewPanel` of at least three `Interviewer`s bound to one `InterviewStage`, and advances the `Application` to stage `Onsite`.

actions.name: SubmitScorecard
actions.description: Submit one Scorecard per Interviewer with a structured recommendation; emit InterviewCompleted when all are in.
actions.descriptionZh: 每名面试官提交一张含结构化推荐意见的评分表；全部齐备时发出面试完成事件。

text.en: Complete the structured interview kit for the InterviewStage.
text.zh: 完成该面试阶段的结构化面试套件。

text.en: Submit exactly one Scorecard per Interviewer with a recommendation.
text.zh: 每名面试官提交恰好一张含推荐意见的评分表。

sideEffects.description: Create a Scorecard record.

interviewer_id.description: Worker id of the submitting interviewer.

agent.toolDescription: Submit a single structured Scorecard for an interview stage.
promptHints: A single interviewer may submit only one scorecard per application.

sources.snippet: `SubmitScorecard` — consumes the structured interview kit for the `InterviewStage`; produces one `Scorecard` per `Interviewer` with a recommendation (Strong Yes / Yes / No / Strong No).

actions.name: RecordHiringDecision
actions.description: Record an Advance to Offer or Reject decision from a complete panel of Scorecards.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据齐备的评分表小组记录“推进至录用”或“拒绝”的决定。

text.en: Verify a complete panel and that every assigned Interviewer submitted a Scorecard.
text.zh: 核实小组齐备且每名指派面试官均已提交评分表。

text.en: Record Advance to Offer or Reject on the Application.
text.zh: 在申请上记录推进至录用或拒绝。

sideEffects.description: Application decision recorded; stage advances to Offer or Rejected.

agent.toolDescription: Record the debrief hiring decision for an Application.
promptHints: Do not record Advance to Offer until every assigned interviewer has submitted a scorecard.

sources.snippet: `RecordHiringDecision` — consumes all `Scorecard`s for the `Application`; produces a decision of `Advance to Offer` or `Reject` on the `Application`.

actions.name: DraftOffer
actions.description: Draft an Offer with base salary, bonus, equity, and start date against the role's SalaryBand.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据该职位薪资范围拟定含基本薪资、奖金、股权与入职日期的录用通知。

text.en: Read the Application, Requisition, and SalaryBand.
text.zh: 读取申请、招聘需求与薪资范围。

text.en: Create the Offer in Draft; enforce below-band exception and sign-on bonus cap.
text.zh: 创建草稿录用通知；执行低于范围例外与签约奖金上限。

sideEffects.description: Create an Offer record in Draft.

agent.toolDescription: Draft a compensation Offer against the role's salary band.
promptHints: A below-minimum base salary requires a documented Compensation Analyst exception.
A sign-on bonus above 20% of base salary requires VP approval.

sources.snippet: `DraftOffer` — consumes the `Application`, the `Requisition`, and the role's `SalaryBand`; produces an `Offer` record in `Draft` with base salary, bonus target, equity, and start date.

actions.name: ValidateOfferBand
actions.description: Determine inBand/aboveBand for an Offer and block if the Requisition is not Approved.
actions.descriptionZh: 判定录用通知为范围内/超范围，若招聘需求未批准则拦截。

text.en: Compare proposed salary to the published SalaryBand for role and location.
text.zh: 将拟定薪资与该职位及地区发布的薪资范围比对。

text.en: Set inBand/aboveBand on the Offer; block if the Requisition is not Approved.
text.zh: 在录用通知上设置范围内/超范围；若招聘需求未批准则拦截。

sideEffects.description: Offer.band_status := InBand | AboveBand | BelowBand.

agent.toolDescription: Determine an Offer's band status and gate on requisition approval.
promptHints: Block any Offer whose Requisition is not in status Approved.

sources.snippet: `ValidateOfferBand` — consumes the `Offer`'s proposed salary and the published `SalaryBand` for the role and location; produces an `inBand` / `aboveBand` determination on the `Offer`. An `Offer` is blocked if the `Requisition` is not `Approved`.

actions.name: ApproveOffer
actions.description: Route the validated Offer for approval; above-band offers additionally require VP approval.
actions.descriptionZh: 将已校验录用通知路由审批；超范围录用须另获VP审批。

text.en: Route to Hiring Manager + HRBP for in-band offers.
text.zh: 范围内录用路由至招聘经理与HRBP。

text.en: For above-band offers, additionally require VP approval recorded against the Requisition.
text.zh: 超范围录用另需针对招聘需求记录VP审批。

sideEffects.description: Create an Approval record for the Offer.
Offer.status := Approved | Pending Approval.

agent.toolDescription: Approve a validated Offer through the appropriate chain.
promptHints: Above-band offers require VP approval recorded against the Requisition.

sources.snippet: `ApproveOffer` — consumes the validated `Offer`; produces an `Approval` record. In-band offers require Hiring Manager + HRBP approval; above-band offers additionally require VP approval recorded against the `Requisition`.

actions.name: ExtendOffer
actions.description: Send an approved Offer to the Candidate via a DocuSign envelope with a valid expiry window.
actions.descriptionZh: 通过 DocuSign 信封向候选人发出已审批录用通知，并设置有效到期窗口。

text.en: Confirm the Offer is Approved, the Requisition is Approved and met the posting period, and any export-control screening cleared.
text.zh: 确认录用已批准、招聘需求已批准并满足发布期、且出口管制筛查通过。

text.en: Send a DocuSign envelope with an expiry no more than 7 business days out; transition Offer to Extended.
text.zh: 发送到期不超过7个工作日的 DocuSign 信封；将录用转为已发出。

sideEffects.description: Send a DocuSign envelope to the Candidate.
Offer.status := Extended.

agent.toolDescription: Send an approved Offer to a candidate via DocuSign.
promptHints: Set the offer expiry to no more than 7 business days after extension.
Regulated roles require a cleared export-control screening before extension.

sources.snippet: `ExtendOffer` — consumes the `Approved` `Offer`; produces a DocuSign envelope sent to the `Candidate` and transitions the `Offer` to `Extended`.

actions.name: RecordOfferResponse
actions.description: Record the Candidate's Accept or Decline from the DocuSign signature event.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据 DocuSign 签署事件记录候选人的接受或拒绝。

text.en: Consume the DocuSign signature event.
text.zh: 接收 DocuSign 签署事件。

text.en: Set Offer status to Accepted or Declined; expire if past the window.
text.zh: 将录用状态设为已接受或已拒绝；超期则置为已过期。

sideEffects.description: Offer.status := Accepted | Declined | Expired.

agent.toolDescription: Record a candidate's acceptance or decline of an Offer.
promptHints: An Offer not accepted by its expiry date transitions to Expired.

sources.snippet: `RecordOfferResponse` — consumes the DocuSign signature event; produces an `Offer` status of `Accepted` or `Declined`.

actions.name: InitiateBackgroundCheck
actions.description: Order a Checkr BackgroundCheck on candidate consent for an accepted Offer.
actions.descriptionZh: 在候选人同意下，针对已接受录用向 Checkr 下单发起背景调查。

text.en: Confirm the Offer is Accepted and obtain Candidate consent.
text.zh: 确认录用已接受并取得候选人同意。

text.en: Order the BackgroundCheck and record the result.
text.zh: 下单背景调查并记录结果。

sideEffects.description: Order a Checkr background screening.
Create a BackgroundCheck record.

agent.toolDescription: Order a background check for an accepted offer.
promptHints: Require documented candidate consent before ordering the check.

sources.snippet: `InitiateBackgroundCheck` — consumes the accepted `Offer` and `Candidate` consent; produces a `BackgroundCheck` record with status `Clear` / `Consider` / `Suspended`.

actions.name: ConvertToHire
actions.description: Create a Workday Worker on a Clear BackgroundCheck, close the Requisition as Filled, and decrement headcount.
actions.descriptionZh: 在背调结果为Clear时创建 Workday 员工，将招聘需求关闭为已填补，并扣减编制。

text.en: Verify the Offer is Accepted and the BackgroundCheck result is Clear; suspend on Consider.
text.zh: 核实录用已接受且背调结果为Clear；结果为Consider时暂停。

text.en: Create a Worker, close the Requisition as Filled, and decrement the Position headcount.
text.zh: 创建员工，将招聘需求关闭为已填补，并扣减职位编制。

sideEffects.description: Create a Worker record in Workday.
Requisition.status := Filled; Position headcount decremented.

agent.toolDescription: Convert an accepted, cleared candidate into a Worker and close the requisition.
promptHints: Do not convert to hire unless the background check result is Clear.
A Consider result suspends the hire pending individualized adjudication.

sources.snippet: `ConvertToHire` — consumes the accepted `Offer` and `Clear` `BackgroundCheck`; produces a `Worker` record in Workday, closes the `Requisition` as `Filled`, and decrements the `Position` headcount.

events.name: hiring-need.identified
events.description: A hiring need has been identified by a Hiring Manager, initiating the requisition process.
events.descriptionZh: 招聘经理已识别出招聘需求，启动需求流程。

events.name: requisition.created
events.description: A draft Requisition has been created in Greenhouse and linked to a Workday Position.
events.descriptionZh: 已在 Greenhouse 中创建草稿招聘需求并关联至 Workday 职位。

events.name: requisition.submitted-for-approval
events.description: A Requisition has passed headcount validation and an Approval task has been routed to the approval chain.
events.descriptionZh: 招聘需求已通过编制校验，并已将审批任务路由至审批链。

events.name: requisition.approved
events.description: A Requisition has been approved by the approval chain and may be published.
events.descriptionZh: 招聘需求已获审批链批准，可以发布。

events.name: job.published
events.description: An approved Requisition has been published as one or more Job Posts, opening the application funnel.
events.descriptionZh: 已审批通过的招聘需求已发布为一个或多个职位帖，开启申请漏斗。

events.name: candidate.sourced
events.description: A passive Candidate has been sourced and a Candidate record created or updated.
events.descriptionZh: 已寻源到一名被动候选人，并创建或更新候选人记录。

events.name: application.received
events.description: An Application has been received linking one Candidate to one Requisition, entering Application Review.
events.descriptionZh: 已接收一份申请，将一名候选人与一项招聘需求关联，进入申请评审阶段。

events.name: application.advanced
events.description: An Application has advanced past Recruiter Screen.
events.descriptionZh: 申请已通过招聘官初筛并推进。

events.name: application.rejected
events.description: An Application has been rejected with a recorded disposition reason.
events.descriptionZh: 申请已被拒绝，并记录了处置原因。

events.name: assessment.completed
events.description: A technical Assessment has been completed and its score written back to the Application.
events.descriptionZh: 技术测评已完成，得分已回写至申请。

events.name: interview.scheduled
events.description: A structured InterviewPanel has been scheduled and the Application advanced to Onsite.
events.descriptionZh: 已安排结构化面试小组，申请推进至现场阶段。

events.name: scorecard.submitted
events.description: An Interviewer has submitted a Scorecard for the Application.
events.descriptionZh: 某面试官已为该申请提交评分表。

sources.snippet: Emitted event: `ScorecardSubmitted`; when all panel scorecards are in, `InterviewCompleted`.

events.name: interview.completed
events.description: All panel Scorecards for an Application have been submitted, completing the interview loop.
events.descriptionZh: 该申请的全部小组评分表均已提交，面试环节完成。

sources.snippet: when all panel scorecards are in, `InterviewCompleted`.

events.name: hiring-decision.recorded
events.description: A hiring decision of Advance to Offer or Reject has been recorded on the Application.
events.descriptionZh: 已在申请上记录“推进至录用”或“拒绝”的招聘决定。

events.name: offer.requested
events.description: An Offer has been requested following a positive hiring decision.
events.descriptionZh: 在正向招聘决定后已请求发出录用通知。

events.name: offer.drafted
events.description: An Offer has been drafted with base salary, bonus target, equity, and start date.
events.descriptionZh: 已拟定录用通知，含基本薪资、奖金目标、股权与入职日期。

events.name: offer.validated
events.description: An Offer has received an inBand/aboveBand determination against the SalaryBand.
events.descriptionZh: 已针对薪资范围对录用通知作出范围内/超范围的判定。

events.name: offer.approved
events.description: An Offer has been approved through the appropriate approval chain.
events.descriptionZh: 录用通知已通过相应审批链获得批准。

events.name: offer.extended
events.description: An approved Offer has been sent to the Candidate via a DocuSign envelope.
events.descriptionZh: 已审批通过的录用通知已通过 DocuSign 信封发送给候选人。

events.name: offer.accepted
events.description: The Candidate has accepted the Offer via DocuSign signature.
events.descriptionZh: 候选人已通过 DocuSign 签署接受录用通知。

events.name: background-check.completed
events.description: A Checkr BackgroundCheck has completed with a Clear/Consider/Suspended result.
events.descriptionZh: Checkr 背景调查已完成，结果为 Clear/Consider/Suspended。

events.name: candidate.hired
events.description: A Worker record has been created in Workday and the candidate is hired.
events.descriptionZh: 已在 Workday 中创建员工记录，候选人入职。

events.name: requisition.closed
events.description: The Requisition has been closed as Filled and Position headcount decremented.
events.descriptionZh: 招聘需求已作为已填补关闭，并已扣减职位编制。

processes.description: From an identified hiring need through headcount validation, approval, and publishing the Job.

sources.snippet: P1 — Requisition Intake & Approval (需求受理与审批)
| P1 Requisition Intake & Approval | `HiringNeedIdentified` | `JobPublished` | Requisition, Position, Approval |

processes.description: From a published Job through sourcing passive candidates and receiving applications.
From a received application through screening, assessment, interviews, and the hiring decision that requests an offer.

sources.snippet: P3 — Screening to Offer (筛选到录用)
| P3 Screening to Offer | `ApplicationReceived` | `OfferRequested` | Application, InterviewStage, Scorecard, Assessment |

processes.description: From an offer request through drafting, band validation, and approval of the offer.

sources.snippet: | P4 Offer Approval | `OfferRequested` | `OfferApproved` | Offer, SalaryBand, Approval |

processes.description: From an approved offer through extension, candidate response, background check, and conversion to hire.

sources.snippet: P5 — Offer to Onboarding (录用到入职)
| P5 Offer to Onboarding | `OfferApproved` | `RequisitionClosed` | Offer, BackgroundCheck, Candidate, Position |

history.note: Initial extraction from TA-SOP-001, TA-POL-002, TA-SYS-003.
